justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misunderstood the user's request for "still this week, latest Friday" and offered an incorrect date (June 2nd) when the current date was June 1st, but then correctly understood the follow-up request for "two weeks from today."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability for the initial request and asked the user to pick a different time without offering alternative slots within the requested timeframe.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was mostly efficient, with the agent quickly processing the user's requests, though the initial temporal misunderstanding added an extra turn.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was acceptable, but the initial misunderstanding of the date and the lack of proactive suggestions for alternative times made it slightly less smooth than ideal.
